fullDescription: Dive into the world of React.js. This comprehensive course covers the core concepts of React, including components, props, state, and lifecycle methods. You will learn how to build dynamic and interactive user interfaces using modern React features like Hooks (useState, useEffect) and Context API. By the end of this course, you will be able to create full-fledged single-page applications from scratch.
requirements: Basic knowledge of HTML and CSS

fullDescription: Master the art of responsive web design with Bootstrap 5. This course teaches you how to leverage the power of the most popular CSS framework to create stunning, mobile-first websites. We will cover the grid system, typography, forms, buttons, and various components like navbars, modals, and carousels. You will also learn how to customize Bootstrap using Sass.

Become a full-stack web developer with this intensive bootcamp. We cover everything from the basics of HTML/CSS to advanced backend development with Node.js and MongoDB. You will learn how to build a complete web application, manage databases, implement authentication, and deploy your projects to the cloud. This course is designed for those who want to start a career in web development.
requirements: No prior experience required, but basic computer skills are helpful

courseName: เธชเธญเธเนเธเนเธเธฒเธ Git เนเธฅเธฐ GitHub เนเธเธเธเธฑเธเธกเธทเธญเธ—เธณ
fullDescription: Learn how to use Git and GitHub to manage your code and collaborate with others. This course takes a 'hand-holding' approach, guiding you through every step from installing Git to creating pull requests. You will learn about repositories, commits, branching, merging, and resolving conflicts. Essential for every developer working in a team environment.
benefits: Build an online presence on GitHub
requirements: Basic understanding of using a computer

fullDescription: Unlock the power of data with Python. This course introduces you to the essential tools for data science, including NumPy for numerical computing, Pandas for data manipulation, and Matplotlib/Seaborn for data visualization. You will learn how to clean data, perform exploratory data analysis, and build basic machine learning models using Scikit-Learn.
benefits: Kickstart your career in Data Science
